subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! The letters have been received, and from their contents spirit and fragrance were obtained. Praise be to God that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان مکاتیب واصل و از مضامین روح و ریحان دست داد الحمد لله که بخدمت
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of dreams and visions, @twin Manifestations, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @praise and encouragement, @symbolism
